<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	<!-- Expo app, TypeScript, file-based routing, Firebase, push notifications, Google/Apple sign-in were already specified. -->

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	<!-- Fresh Expo app created in the current folder. -->

- [ ] Customize the Project
	<!-- Migrate app-specific features from the old BarTalk project into this clean scaffold. -->

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	<!-- No extensions needed. -->

- [ ] Compile the Project
	<!-- Install missing dependencies, run diagnostics, and resolve issues after migration. -->

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	<!-- Add only if the new project needs a dedicated VS Code task. -->

- [ ] Launch the Project
	<!-- Run only after compile and migration steps are complete. -->

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- Update README and clean this file after migration is complete. -->

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
